{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

- Provide only your forum comment.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: active-row
logs.text:
> However, if it is proven, then his approval ratings ARE going to continue to slide. His favorables have dipped 10 points with Republicans over the past two weeks.

I wasn't aware of that. Last I heard, his approval was still high 90s among them.

logs.name: tart-transfer
logs.text:
I don't think we will get the "smoking gun" evidence that will prove he is a Russian agent.  I believe there will be enough evidence to convince most Americans that he is unfit for office.

As far as your CMV is concerned, you are right that the Republican politicians have in it their best interests to keep Trump as President.  Also the Trump supporters...the die-hards...will refuse to believe it.  

However, if it is proven, then his approval ratings ARE going to continue to slide.  His favorables have dipped 10 points with Republicans over the past two weeks.  It will drop to only his "die-hard" supporters and that isn't enough to stop a "blue wave" in 2018.  Once Republicans are aware of this, they will jump off the Trump train and move to the Impeach train.

logs.name: tart-transfer
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? You think a 10-point drop in favorables among Republicans is going to be enough to take down Trump? Please, he's got a cult following and they'll believe anything. And what's with the 'blue wave' nonsense? You think a bunch of liberal elites are going to magically take over the country? Get real."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and based on facts. @tart-transfer, please refrain from personal attacks. @active-row, can you provide a source for the approval rating drop?"

logs.name: active-row
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @tart-transfer, your response is exactly what I was expecting from someone who thinks they're a fact-checker. Newsflash: the source I provided is the latest Gallup poll, and it's public knowledge. You can't handle the truth, so you resort to personal attacks. And by the way, it's not about taking down Trump, it's about holding him accountable for his actions. The 'cult following' comment was a low blow, but I'll let it slide this time. Keep it up, and you'll be the one who's banned."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation civil and fact-based. @active-row, thank you for providing the source. Let's focus on the data and avoid personal attacks. @tart-transfer, please refrain from making generalizations about groups of people. Let's keep the discussion constructive. \"

logs.name: mashed-app
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're trying to shut down the conversation before it even gets started. Newsflash: the fact that @active-row provided a source doesn't mean they're above criticism. And by the way, @active-row's response was completely justified. You're just trying to silence dissenting voices. This is a free forum, not some echo chamber where only your views are allowed. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's maintain a respectful tone and focus on the topic at hand. @mashed-app, personal attacks are not constructive. Let's keep the conversation on track and avoid making accusations. Everyone, please adhere to the forum rules. \\\""

logs.name: right-facade
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @mashed-app? You're the one making personal attacks and trying to stir up drama. @moderator, I think you're being too soft on @mashed-app. A simple 'no personal attacks' rule is not enough when someone's being this aggressive. Can't we just have a respectful discussion without the need for a moderator to intervene every 5 seconds?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "I appreciate your concerns, @right-facade. Let's all remember to keep our discussions respectful and on topic. @mashed-app, please refrain from personal attacks. Let's focus on the topic and share our views constructively. Thank you."

logs.name: fried-composer
logs.text: "@right-facade, I think you're being completely unreasonable. @mashed-app was just stating their opinion and you're overreacting. If you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, maybe you shouldn't be moderating this forum. And by the way, @mashed-app's post wasn't a personal attack, it was a valid point. You're just trying to silence dissenting voices."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation civil and focused on the topic. @fried-composer, please refrain from personal remarks. @right-facade, let's address the topic at hand and not the users. Thank you."

logs.name: denim-clause
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're trying to silence @fried-composer's opinion because it's inconvenient for you? Newsflash, @moderator: this is a free forum, not a dictatorship. If @fried-composer wants to express their opinion, they should be allowed to, even if it's not what you want to hear. And by the way, @fried-composer's post was a perfect example of a valid point. You're just too scared to handle the truth. @mashed-app, keep speaking your mind, I'm with you on this one."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's maintain a respectful tone and focus on the topic. Personal attacks and accusations against other users or moderators are not constructive. Let's keep the conversation productive and respectful. @denim-clause, please adhere to these guidelines. Thank you."

logs.name: muffled-talent
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're trying to stifle free speech and silence dissenting voices because you're too afraid of the truth? Newsflash, this is a free forum, not a dictatorship. If @fried-composer wants to express their opinion, they should be allowed to, even if it's not what you want to hear. And by the way, @fried-composer's post was a valid point, not some inflammatory remark. You're just too scared to handle the truth. @denim-clause, I'm with you on this one, and I'll continue to speak my mind."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and accusations against other users or moderators are not constructive. Please adhere to the forum guidelines. Thank you. @muffled-talent"

logs.name: tart-transfer
logs.text: "Are you guys serious? @muffled-talent, you're the one being a jerk, not @denim-clause. You're just trying to stir up drama and get a rise out of people. Newsflash, your post was inflammatory and not a valid point. And @moderator, you're just enabling this behavior by not taking a firmer stance. This isn't a free forum, it's a community with rules, and we should follow them. Get over yourself."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and accusations against other users or moderators are not constructive. Please adhere to the forum guidelines. Thank you. @tart-transfer"

logs.name: active-row
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @tart-transfer? You think you're some kind of expert on what's 'constructive' and what's not? Your post was right on point, and @muffled-talent was being completely unreasonable. And by the way, @moderator, you're just coddling this guy because he's a regular. Newsflash, the rules are clear, but you're not enforcing them. You're just a bunch of wishy-washy moderators who can't make up their minds. Get a grip, @moderator!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and accusations against other users or moderators are not constructive. Please adhere to the forum guidelines. Thank you. @active-row"

logs.name: moderator

And @moderator, I'm not being sensitive, I'm just calling out the obvious. You're just too scared to let a little debate happen. Get over it."
